name: Chocolate Yogurt Ice
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a food processor or blender.
2. Whip until thoroughly blended but not melted.
3. Pour into 4 tall glasses.
4. Place in freezer until mixture is slightly frozen.
5. Stir, top with 1 tablespoon (15 ml.) nondairy whipped topping, and serve.
